title: 15-Second Product Video Creator Asset
summary: How a rough AI product-video concept became a polished, platform-ready launch package through review, iteration, audio testing, proof-building, QA, and final packaging.
outcome: Delivered an R1 package with 15 platform-specific exports, posting instructions, reusable templates, narrative materials, and QA history.

title: R1 Video Reviewer Panel
summary: A role-based reviewer system that improved a personal-agent promo across craft, platform fit, business clarity, accessibility, and audio identity.
outcome: V19 reached a 9.1/10 average reviewer score, unanimous reviewer preference, and full export QA pass.

title: Labs Site Build
summary: A standalone GitHub Pages lab that separates structured project documentation from the polished Squarespace marketing site.
outcome: Published a JSON-driven project library with search, filters, reusable entry templates, Git history, GitHub Pages hosting, and Squarespace DNS.

title: AI Meetup Captain's Log
summary: A practical log generator for turning what happened at an AI meetup into takeaways, follow-ups, and content angles.
outcome: Published a JSON-backed mini-tool with sample captain's logs, log-type filters, a draft form, and reusable post-meetup prompts.
